title: ComputationWitness
description: JSON shape of a *.witness.json file emitted by qou-substrate's WitnessBuilder. Canonical reference for the QOU witness format — readable from any language.

engine.description: Computation engine that produced this witness. (`snappy` is the legacy name for `snappea` — both are accepted; new witnesses should prefer `snappea`.)

commitSha.description: Git commit SHA at the time the witness was produced. 'unknown' if not in a git repo.

scriptCommitSha.description: Git commit SHA of the last change to the producing script.

scriptHash.description: SHA-256 (hex prefix) of the producing script's content; used for staleness detection.

scriptFile.description: Path to the producing script, relative to repo root.

name.description: Computation name; the witness file is `<name>.witness.json`.

contentBlock.description: Optional content-block label this witness was authored for (e.g. 'prop:foo'). Self-claim; not authoritative — the block must reference the witness back.

auditOnly.description: Optional. Path (relative to repo root) of the audit-report doc this witness backs. Marks the witness as audit-only — not expected to wire to a content block.

assertions.description: List of named claims with computed vs expected values.

allPassed.description: Convenience: whether every assertion's `passed` is true.

parameters.description: Caller-supplied input parameters echoed into the witness for reproducibility.

data.description: Caller-supplied output data. The key `upstream_witness_hashes` (when present) carries per-upstream-witness hash records used by the stale-witness validator to detect drift from an upstream's regeneration; everything else is free-form.

upstream_witness_hashes.description: Per-upstream-witness hash records for stale-witness detection.

caveats.description: Free-text caveats / known limitations of the computation.

precisionMetadata.description: Substrate-precision parameters used to produce this witness. Optional but recommended on substrate-precision compute paths (mpmath / Decimal / rug). Added 2026-05-24.

computed.description: Computed value from the script. Numbers can be encoded as either JSON number or arbitrary-precision string.

expected.description: Expected value (from the paper / CODATA / OEIS / a previous computation).

passed.description: Whether |computed - expected| ≤ tolerance (or equality for non-numeric).

source.description: Source of the expected value, e.g. 'CODATA 2022', 'OEIS A091518'.

PrecisionMetadata.description: Substrate-precision parameters. All fields optional; producers should emit whichever are meaningful for their compute path.

output_dps.description: Formatting precision for emitted assertion values (≤ compute_dps − guard_digits).

truncation_bound.description: String form of the maximum acceptable truncation error (e.g. "1e-40"). Kept as a string to avoid float round-trip loss.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the upstream witness file's raw bytes.
